Patch

Patch from 9.2.1 to 9.3.1

This patch updates www/glpi to the latest version and fixes some directory permissions.

ChangeLog at https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/blob/9.3/bugfixes/CHANGELOG.md#931-2018-09-12

This patch fixes
- PR 225083
- PR 232065

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs.
